label: Keycap
summary: A <kbd> dressed as a beveled keycap.
era: "Press CTRL+D to bookmark this site!", the era's favorite parting instruction, finally wearing real keycaps.

classes.name: rs-kbd
classes.role: keycap chrome on <kbd>: sunken bevel, mono, tight padding

a11y: The element stays a semantic <kbd>, so keyboard input reads as keyboard input; the keycap is only chrome.
